灹ितशत से 2 灹ितशत तक तथा बचा 牣आ िह瀡सा तांबा। म瀇य म瀇य म瀇य म瀇य भाग भाग भाग भाग ((((कू灹ोिनकल कू灹ोिनकल कू灹ोिनकल कू灹ोिनकल)))) तांबा एवं िनकल दोन犘 के िलए 1 灹ितशत कम या अिधक अथा榁त, तांबे म犆 74 灹ितशत से 76 灹ितशत तक तथा िनकल म犆 24 灹ितशत से 26 灹ितशत तक का अंतर हो सकेगा। 2.5 灹ितशत कम या अिधक अथा榁त् वजन म犆 7.52 灡ाम से 7.90 灡ाम तक का अंतर हो सकेगा। [फा. सं. 04/06/2016-िस猳ा] 灹शांत गोयल, संयु榉त सिचव MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economic Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 3rd June, 2019 G.S.R. 401(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clauses (d) and (e) of sub-section (2) of section 24 of the Coinage Act, 2011 (11 of 2011), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, namely:— 1. Short title and commencement.–(1)These rules may be called the Coinage of issue of Two Hundred and Ten Rupees Coins to commemorate the occasion of 2nd Birth Centenary of Sri Satguru Ram Singh Ji Rules, 2019. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Denomination of coins.–The coins of the following denominations shall also be coined at the Mint for issue under the authority of the Central Government to commemorate the occasion of “2nd Birth Centenary of Sri Satguru Ram Singh Ji”, namely:— (i) Two Hundred Rupees; (ii) Ten Rupees. 3. Dimension and composition of coins.–The coins of the denominations mentioned in rule 2 shall conform to the following dimensions and composition, namely:— -- 3 of 5 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] 4. Design.– The design of the coins shall be as specified in the First Schedule to these rules. 5. Standard weight and remedy allowed.– The standard weight of the coins of above denominations coined to commemorate the occasion of 2nd Birth Centenary of Sri Satguru Ram Singh Ji and the remedy allowed in making of such coins shall be as specified in the Second Schedule to these rules. First Schedule (See rule 4) (i) TWO HUNDRED RUPEES OBVERSE: This face of the coin shall bear the Lion Capitol of Ashoka Pillar in the center with the legend “सयमेव सयमेव सयमेव सयमेव जयते जयते जयते जयते” inscribed below, flanked on the left periphery with the word “भारत भारत भारत भारत” in Devanagari script and on the right periphery with the word “INDIA” in English, and it shall also bear the Rupee symbol “ ```` ” and denominational value “200” in the international numeral below the Lion Capitol. REVERSE: This face of the coin shall bear the portrait of “SRI SATGURU RAM SINGH JI” in the center with the inscription ’’’’’’’’炈ी सतगु牲 राम 琐संह जी क琉 ि獧तीय ज瀈म 炈ी सतगु牲 राम 琐संह जी क琉 ि獧तीय ज瀈म 炈ी सतगु牲 राम 琐संह जी क琉 ि獧तीय ज瀈म 炈ी सतगु牲 राम 琐संह जी क琉 ि獧तीय ज瀈म शता瀑दी शता瀑दी शता瀑दी शता瀑दी’’’’’’’’ in Devanagari script on upper periphery and “2nd BIRTH CENTENARY OF SRI SATGURU RAM SINGH JI” in English shall be written on the lower periphery of the coin. The year “1816-2016” shall be written in international numeral at the bottom of the portrait. (ii) TEN RUPEES OBVERSE: This face of the coin shall bear the Lion Capitol of Ashoka Pillar in the center with the legend “सयमेव सयमेव सयमेव सयमेव जयते जयते जयते जयते” inscribed below, flanked on the left periphery with the word “भारत भारत भारत भारत” in Devanagri script and on the right periphery with the word “INDIA” in English, and it shall also bear the Rupee symbol “ ```` ” and denominational value “10” in the international numeral below the Lion Capitol. Nickel - 25 per cent. -- 4 of 5 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 5 REVERSE: This face of the coin shall bear the portrait of “SRI SATGURU RAM SINGH JI” in the center with the inscription ’’’’’’’’炈ी सतगु牲 राम 琐संह जी क琉 ि獧तीय ज瀈म 炈ी सतगु牲 राम 琐संह जी क琉 ि獧तीय ज瀈म 炈ी सतगु牲 राम 琐संह जी क琉 ि獧तीय ज瀈म 炈ी सतगु牲 राम 琐संह जी क琉 ि獧तीय ज瀈म शता瀑दी शता瀑दी शता瀑दी शता瀑दी’’’’’’’’ in Devanagari script and “2nd BIRTH CENTENARY OF SRI SATGURU RAM SINGH JI” in English shall be written on the lower periphery of the coin. The year “1816-2016” shall be written in international numeral at bottom of the portrait. Second Schedule (See rule 5) Denomination of coin Standard weight Remedy allowed In composition In standard weight (1) (2) (3) (4) Two Hundred Rupees 35 Grams 1/500th plus or minus for Silver, that is to say the Silver content may vary from 498 to 502 per 1000. 1/100th plus or minus, that is to say, the weight could be 34.65 grams to 35.35 grams. Ten Rupees 7.71 Grams (outer ring 4.45 grams and center piece 3.26 grams) Outer ring- (Aluminium Bronze): Aluminium - 5.5 per cent to 6 per cent. Nickel – 1.75 per cent. to 2 per cent. and remainder are copper. Center piece – (Cupro- Nickel): plus or minus 1 per cent for both Copper and Nickel, that is to say, the copper may vary from 74 per cent to 76 per cent. and Nickel from 24 per cent to 26 per cent. Plus or minus 2.5 per cent. that is to say, weight could vary from 7.52 grams to 7.90 grams. [F.No. 04/06/2016-Coin] PRASHANT GOYAL, Jt. Secy.
